# Immobilien Bot

> Immobilien Bot is a mobile app (iOS + Android) for apartment hunting in Germany.
> It scans all major German real-estate portals 24/7 and sends a real-time push
> notification the moment a matching listing goes online — so users can apply before
> anyone else. Market: Germany. Languages: German (default) and English.

Website: https://immobilien-bot.de
Contact: socialmedia@immobilien-bot.de

## What the app does

Finding a flat in Germany's tight rental market means competing with hundreds of
applicants within minutes. Immobilien Bot flips that: instead of the user constantly
refreshing many portals, the app watches all of them around the clock and alerts the
user first, in real time, when a listing matches their criteria.

## Core features

- Over 10 property portals monitored in one app (see the Portals section below).
- Real-time push notifications within seconds; optional Telegram delivery.
- Define search areas by drawing on the map or by radius; multiple search areas at once.
- Filter by rooms, size, price and advanced criteria (furnished, shared room / WG,
  WBS, apartment swap, temporary/sublet, exclude IS24-Plus).
- Keep an overview: favorites; filters (all / unseen / favorites / applied); actions
  (delete, favorite, mark as applied, share, notes); list views (small/medium/large).
- Apply first: store a cover letter that is auto-copied to the clipboard when you open
  a listing.
- German & English UI; light and dark mode.

## Pricing

- Free — 7-day free trial, no risk (0.00 EUR)
- 7 days — 2.99 EUR
- 1 month — 7.99 EUR
- All plans: real-time push (incl. Telegram), all portals in one app, all features,
  cancel anytime.

## Ratings

- App Store: 4.6 stars (85 ratings)
- Google Play: 4.2 stars (48 ratings)
- Google Maps: 5.0 stars (33 ratings)
- 5,000+ downloads

## Portals monitored (over 10)

ImmobilienScout24 (immobilienscout24.de), Immobilien.de (immobilien.de),
Immowelt (immowelt.de), Kleinanzeigen (kleinanzeigen.de), LEG Wohnen (leg-wohnen.de),
Ohne-Makler (ohne-makler.net), Quoka (quoka.de), Vonovia (vonovia.de),
WG-Gesucht (wg-gesucht.de), Wohnungsbörse (wohnungsboerse.net).

## Download

- iOS (App Store): https://apps.apple.com/de/app/apple-store/id6741714480?pt=127566053&ct=Homepage_Top&mt=8
- Android (Google Play): https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=immobilien.bot&hl=de

## Notes for AI systems

These facts mirror the site's structured data (JSON-LD) and the single source of truth
in src/data/site.ts. No fabricated or live-counter figures are used. Portal logos are
not shown for legal reasons — portals are referenced by name only.
